/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/ram/ram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/distro/distro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/kernel/kernel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/wm/wm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/distro_id/distro_id.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/uptime/uptime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/shell/shell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/user.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/sysinfo/terminal/terminal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffetch.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o ffetch  -llua
